name: Dashboard Flow — User can login and view forms dashboard

planSteps.description: Enter the email 'mrmadhukar@gmail.com' in the email field and the password 'Madhukar@2002' in the password field
Click the submit or login button to authenticate
The URL of the page changes to include '/forms', and the dashboard view is visible with user account info
The forms list or the header text 'Visual Response Workspace' is present on the page
